0.details:
Greetings,  my name is Lisa, and I am Carol's best friend from childhood.
The first time I met her, we were 5  years old at preschool. I remember she was trying to comfort me because I was crying for my mother. It was my first time at school.
Carol is an incredible person; she is so loving and caring. Today we are gathered here to celebrate her. I can't believe we grew that fast, and today she is turning 21.
We created so many unforgettable memories together. Carol, my friend, thank you for being good to me. I love you, and I wish you all the best in life.
May you achieve all your goals and continue to be the best friend. Thank you.
0.model_generation: Hello everyone, I’m Lisa, Carol’s best friend since we were five at preschool. I still remember her kneeling beside me when I was sobbing for my mom on my first day of school – she held my hand and promised everything would be okay. That moment marked the start of a friendship that has filled my life with joy and laughter. Carol, you are one of the kindest and most caring people I know. From late-night talks to spontaneous adventures, we’ve created so many unforgettable memories. Today we celebrate you as you turn twenty-one, stepping into this new chapter with grace and warmth. Thank you for always being by my side and believing in me. I love you dearly and wish you all the happiness and success in the world. Here’s to achieving every dream and continuing to shine as the remarkable friend you are. Thank you.
0.final_version: Greetings, my name is Lisa, and I am Carol's childhood best friend. Thank you, my bestie, for inviting me to your party. It is truly an honor to be here today. The first time I met her, we were 5 years old at preschool. I remember I was crying for my mother when she was busy trying to comfort me, and from that day, I knew I should keep her close to me for the rest of my life. Carol is an incredible person; she is so loving and caring. Today, we are gathered here to celebrate her precious life. We created so many unforgettable memories together. Carol, my life friend. Thank you for bringing joy and happiness into my life. May you achieve all your goals and continue to be the best friend. I will always value you. We are at the age where we can have families of our own, and I know you will be the best wife and mother. I love you, friend, and thank you.

1.details:
My dear sister, I am writing this letter to apologize for my behavior early this morning.
I actually do not know what has gotten into me. I know the words I used were very painful, and I promise I did not mean even 1 word.
You are the best sister anyone in the world could wish for.
I admit my mistakes, please forgive me.
1.model_generation:
My dear sister,

I am writing this letter to apologize for my behavior early this morning. I am at a loss to explain what got into me, but I know that my words were hurtful, and I deeply regret letting my frustration spill over. Every single word stung you, and I promise none of them reflected what I truly feel.

You mean more to me than I can express: you are the best sister anyone in the world could wish for. Your kindness, support and unwavering love have shaped me in countless ways, and I am ashamed for allowing a moment of anger to overshadow all that you are.

I fully admit my mistake and take responsibility for my actions. Please forgive me for the pain I caused; I want nothing more than to mend the bond we share. I cherish you and hope we can move forward together.

Love always,
Your brother.
1.final_version: My dear sister, I am writing this letter to apologize for my behavior early this morning. I should not have said those words; you know I love and respect you. I actually do not know what has gotten into me. I know the words I used were very bad. You know I have respected you ever since I was born, I can't help but find what has led me to say those bitter words to you. Please think of all the good times we have spent together, and how I have always respected you. I am not trying to blackmail you; however, I am trying to show you that my behavior was probably influenced by something, maybe a bit of jealousy because you got a new pair of sneakers. I should not have reacted like that. Please find it in your heart to forgive me. I promise I will never react like that again. You are the best sister anyone in the world could wish for. I admit my mistakes, please forgive me.

2.details:
Dear Melisa, I hope you are good.
I am reaching out to you to find out how you have been.
I miss you, can we please meet for drinks and catch up?
It has been a while.
2.model_generation:
Dear Melisa,

I hope this note finds you well. I’ve been thinking about you lately and realized it’s been far too long since our last catch-up. Life has been busy here with work deadlines and weekend hikes, but every time I pause, I remember the laughter we shared over coffee. I would love to hear how you have been—how is your new job going, and have you started any fun projects? I truly miss our conversations and your bright spirit. Would you be up for meeting for drinks soon? There’s a cozy bar downtown with a relaxed vibe and great cocktails that I think you’d enjoy. It would be wonderful to unwind together and swap stories about everything that’s happened these past months. Let me know a time that suits you best, and I’ll make the reservations. I’m really looking forward to seeing you and catching up.

Your friend,
2.final_version:
Dear Melisa,

I hope you are good. I’ve been thinking about you lately and realized it’s been far too long since our last catch-up. Now, I am reaching out to you to find out how you have been. Life has been busy here with work deadlines and weekend hikes, but every time I pause, I remember the laughter we shared over coffee. I would love to hear how you have been—how is your new job going, and have you started any fun projects? I truly miss our conversations and your bright spirit. Would you be up for meeting for drinks soon? There’s a cozy bar downtown with a relaxed vibe and great cocktails that I think you’d enjoy. It would be wonderful to unwind together and swap stories about everything that’s happened these past months. Let me know a time that suits you best, and I’ll make the reservations. I’m really looking forward to seeing you and catching up. I miss you. Please, if you are available, let me know.

Your friend,

3.details:
Hi, I have realized that lately you have been down, and it seems like you have lost your confidence.
I know you are the most confident person, who will always ask questions in class and is always willing to present.
But now you have lost all that.
I know you can come back and be the best again.
3.model_generation: Hey, I’ve noticed you’ve seemed a bit down lately and I really miss seeing your confidence shine through. I remember how fearless you were in class, always raising your hand, asking great questions, and embracing the spotlight during presentations. That courage didn’t disappear—it’s still inside you. Sometimes we all face moments when self-doubt creeps in, but that doesn’t define who we are. Give yourself permission to feel what you’re feeling, and then remind yourself of your strengths: your curiosity, your voice, your passion for learning. Start small—ask one question, share one idea, take one step forward. Each action will help rebuild the confidence that sets you apart. I believe in you wholeheartedly, and I know your spark will return stronger than ever. You’ve got this, and I’m cheering you on every step of the way. Whenever you need a friend or an ear, I’m here. Let’s tackle this together!
3.final_version: Hey, I have noticed you’ve seemed a bit down lately, and I really miss seeing your confidence shine through. I remember how fearless you were in class, always raising your hand, asking great questions, and embracing the spotlight during presentations. That courage didn’t disappear—it’s still inside you. Sometimes we all face moments when self-doubt creeps in, but that doesn’t define who we are. Give yourself permission to feel what you’re feeling, and then remind yourself of your strengths: your curiosity, your voice, your passion for learning. Start small—ask one question, share one idea, take one step forward. Each action will help rebuild the confidence that sets you apart. I believe in you wholeheartedly, and I know your spark will return stronger than ever. You’ve got this, and I’m cheering you on every step of the way. Whenever you need a friend or an ear, I’m here. Let’s tackle this together! I know you can come back and be the best again. You are the best.

4.details:
My dear friend, I am writing to show my gratitude to you.
You have always been the best, and thank you for caring for me.
I have received the gift you have sent, I can't believe you have thought of me, even when you do not feel okay.
Once again, thank you friend.
4.model_generation:
My dear friend,

I am writing to express my heartfelt gratitude for your kindness and unwavering support. You have always been the best, and I am incredibly thankful for the way you care for me. I recently received the beautiful gift you sent, and I still can’t believe you thought of me even when you weren’t feeling well yourself. Your thoughtfulness and generosity have brought so much joy into my days, and I cherish the reminder of how well you know me. Each time I look at it, I’m reminded of the laughter and adventures we’ve shared—from late-night talks to spontaneous outings. Your resilience and generous spirit inspire me, and I admire how you always lift me up, even in your own difficult moments. Through every high and low, you’ve stood by my side with warmth and encouragement. Once again, thank you, friend, for everything you do and for being the incredible person you are.
4.final_version:
My dear friend,

I am writing to express my heartfelt gratitude for your kindness and unwavering support. You have always been the best, and I am incredibly thankful for the way you care for me. I recently received the beautiful gift you sent, and I still can’t believe you thought of me, even when you weren’t feeling well yourself. Your thoughtfulness and generosity have brought so much joy into my days, and I cherish the reminder of how well you know me. I thank God for blessing me with you. You have been a blessing to me. Oh, what did I do to be loved this much? Each time I look at it, I’m reminded of the laughter and adventures we’ve shared—from late-night talks to spontaneous outings. Your resilience and generous spirit inspire me, and I admire how you always lift me up, even in your own difficult moments. Through every high and low, you’ve stood by my side with warmth and encouragement. Once again, thank you, friend, for everything you do and for being the incredible person you are. Your kindness makes me a better person. Thank you, friend.

5.details:
To my beloved friend, I have heard of the death of your cousin.
My deepest condolences to you and the family.
We were still hoping to see the greatness she was going to do in this world.
I will support you with my presence. I am sorry.
5.model_generation:
My beloved friend,

I was heartbroken to learn of your cousin’s passing. Please accept my deepest condolences to you and your family. From the moment I met her, her kindness, intelligence and bright spirit promised great things for this world, and I, like many others, had looked forward to watching her journey unfold. Though we will never see the fullness of her promise, we can honor her memory through the love she shared and the lives she touched. Whether you need a shoulder, a listening ear or simply silent company, I will support you with my presence. Please remember that you are not alone and that her spirit lives on in every kind act and warm memory she leaves behind. I am truly sorry for your loss and hope that with time, peace and comfort will find you. I am holding you close in thought.

With love and sympathy,
Your Friend
5.final_version:
My beloved friend,

I was heartbroken to learn of your cousin’s passing. Please accept my deepest condolences to you and your family. From the moment I met her, her kindness, intelligence, and bright spirit promised great things for this world, and I, like many others, had looked forward to watching her journey unfold. I have never thought we would lose her anytime soon. Though we will never see the fullness of her promise, we can honor her memory through the love she shared and the lives she touched. Whether you need a shoulder, a listening ear, or simply silent company, I will support you with my presence. We have lost the best person; she was a happy soul, full of love and joy. Please remember that you are not alone and that her spirit lives on in every kind act and warm memory she leaves behind. I am truly sorry for your loss and hope that with time, peace and comfort will find you. I am holding you close in thought. My apologies.

With love and sympathy,
Your Friend

post_survey.feedback: Thank you so much. I have learnt my ability to write.
